description: Style NoteEvery girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. aurelia considers the street fads that are trending currently and adds it to their latest collection of kurtas. This stylish piece remains ethnic in its cut and silhouette but references contemporary design details to create unique fusion wear. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris.Product DetailsRed bucket neck kurta, has tape detail around the neck, zari work on the chest, short sleeves, square neck at the back and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cotton Wash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
